articles.title: FM Nirmala Sitharaman pushes unified KYC framework, asks Sebi to lead
articles.description: Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman called for a single know-your-customer system across the financial sector. She asked the Securities and Exchange Board of India to lead this initiative. The minister also urged Sebi to focus on future risks. These include artificial intelligence misuse and cyber threats. A strong defense against cyberattacks is crucial for market stability and public trust.

articles.title: 8th Pay Commission: Up to 4x pay hike, ₹72,000 minimum pay, OPS return - What employees want

articles.title: GST depends on each item, Not the combo pack: Tax Authority Rules
articles.description: The ruling establishes a clear principle: the method of packaging has no bearing on how tax is calculated. Each item inside a combo pack retains its individual identity, and GST is applied to the value of each individual unit, not to the total value of the pack as a whole.

articles.title: Sebi to expedite rule simplification, boost tech-led oversight: Chairman Tuhin Kanta Pandey on 38th anniversary
articles.description: The Securities and Exchange Board of India plans to simplify market regulations. Chairman Tuhin Kanta Pandey stated the regulator will focus on ease of doing business for all participants. Sebi will also invest in technology for supervision. The goal is to foster market development and contribute to faster economic growth.

articles.description: Deloitte will cut parental leave, PTO, pension accruals and IVF-related benefits for some US employees from 2027, as part of a broader restructuring and benefits overhaul.

articles.title: Wall Street Week Ahead: Soaring US stocks face pivotal week of tech-led earnings, Fed meeting
articles.description: Indian markets brace for a crucial week. Major tech giants like Microsoft and Alphabet report earnings. Investors watch for clues on artificial intelligence spending. The U.S. Federal Reserve meets, with potential changes at its helm. Economic growth and inflation data will also be released. Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East remain a key concern for asset prices.

articles.title: Rajasthan innovator develops portable wind turbine, gains global demand across 50 countries
articles.description: Young entrepreneur Dungar Singh Sodha has developed a portable 1 kW wind turbine to address power cuts in remote regions. His innovation, designed for low-wind areas, can generate significant electricity and has garnered international demand, with plans for large-scale installations in Greece and Rajasthan.

articles.title: Heatwave warning in Delhi: IMD issues yellow alert amid rising temperatures
articles.description: Delhi experienced a slight rise in minimum temperatures on Saturday, with the India Meteorological Department issuing a yellow alert for potential heatwave conditions in isolated areas. Maximum temperatures are expected to hover around 40-42 degrees Celsius. Meanwhile, the city's air quality remains in the 'poor' category, with a forecast of improvement to 'moderate' early next week.

articles.title: Sumitomo Mitsui infuses Rs 1,075 cr into NBFC arm
articles.description: Japanese conglomerate Sumitomo Mitsui Financial Group has injected ₹1,075 crore into its Indian arm, SMFG India Credit. This follows a significant ₹3,000 crore infusion in December 2024. SMFG India Credit's assets under management reached ₹64,100 crore by December 2025. The group also increased its stake in Yes Bank to 24.2% in September 2025.
